nodes.context: A powerful 'Ndrangheta clan based in Rosarno, Calabria, involved in drug and arms trafficking, extortion, and control of commercial activities.
A criminal and mafia-type organization in Calabria, Italy, of which the Bellocco 'ndrina is a clan.
An 'Ndrangheta clan involved in drug supply through the Port of Gioia Tauro.
An 'Ndrangheta clan allied with the Bellocco, involved in drug trafficking and port control.
An 'Ndrangheta clan that collaborated with Bellocco and Pesce in controlling port contracts and activities.
A mafia-type organization in Apulia, set up with involvement from Umberto Bellocco to counter Camorra influence.
A mafia-type organization from Campania, Italy, which the SCU was formed to counter, but later allied with Bellocco.
A Camorra clan that used support from Bellocco and Pesce to supply drugs in Castellammare di Stabia.
An allied clan mentioned in the infobox as an ally of Bellocco.
An allied clan mentioned in the infobox as an ally of Bellocco.

edges.context: The Bellocco 'ndrina is a clan of the 'Ndrangheta.
The Mancusos are mentioned as a source for drug supply through the Port of Gioia Tauro, alongside Bellocco.
The Bellocco and Pesce clans are frequently mentioned together as allies, controlling port activities and drug trafficking.
The Bellocco and Piromalli-Molè clans collaborated in controlling public contracts for the container terminal at the Port of Gioia Tauro.
Umberto Bellocco was involved in setting up the Sacra Corona Unita, importing 'Ndrangheta codes and structure.
The Sacra Corona Unita was formed to counter the growing influence of the Camorra in Apulia.
The Bellocco clan is listed as an ally of the Camorra in the infobox.
The Bellocco and Pesce 'ndrine supported the Camorra D'Alessandro clan in supplying drugs to Castellammare di Stabia.
The Capriati clan is listed as an ally in the infobox.
The Parisi-Palermiti clan is listed as an ally in the infobox.
